stemHtml: Which of the following correctly defines Manifold Absolute Pressure (MAP) and identifies the instrument used to obtain this measurement in a piston engine?

options.a: The absolute pressure present within the induction system, detected by a pressure sensing device.
options.b: The absolute pressure found within the exhaust system, detected by a pressure sensing device.
options.c: The pressure level inside the combustion chamber, obtained via a temperature sensing device.
options.d: The absolute pressure of the exhaust gases, obtained via a temperature sensing device.
